title: TREATMENT AND RECOVERY SERVICES - 211info
text: SAMARITAN TREATMENT AND RECOVERY SERVICES - NEWPORT TREATMENT AND RECOVERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides treatment for substance use disorders in both residential and outpatient settings. Residential program may have a waitlist and outpatient clients may receive priority. 5840 NW Biggs Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Office hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Program hours: Varies by service (541) 451-6388 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 451-6388 Outpatient Services Intake (541) 451-7439 Residential Services INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for screening FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP (InterCommunity Health Network CCO), Medicare, and private insurances. Financial assistance and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
